chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1206 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.5703/2023 2. For hearing of main case 20.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rafi Kamboh, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Under instructions learned counsel for respondent states that the impugned notice is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view thereof petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
